rail.step1Desc: What we record on this device

whoSees.personal: Only you see this. Nothing leaves your computer.
whoSees.employee: Your manager can review this for work hours.
whoSees.kid: Your parent can see this to help with screen time.

bullets.foreground: Which app is in the foreground & for how long
bullets.keypress: Keypress counts only — never the actual keys
bullets.webPages: Web pages visited (with the browser extension)

step2.heading: What you can turn off
step2.managedNote: ⌬ Some settings are managed by your {{owner}} and shown locked.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.desc: Periodically save screenshots of your screen(s)

keypress.title: Keypress counting
keypress.desc: Counts only — never which keys are pressed

domainOnly.title: Domain-only URLs
domainOnly.desc: Store just the site (example.com), not the full address

step2.changeLater: You can change these any time in Settings.
step2.title: Configure capture
step2.subtitle: Set how BiBoTracking records. Change these anytime in Settings.

step3.heading: Grant permissions
step3.subtitle: macOS asks your OK for each capture type. We'll open the system prompts.
